calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Jill Bates-Moore, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff CACH, LLC.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant CHARLES E. HARRIS.
Declaration of Signe Espinoza pursuant to CCP 98, submitted in lieu of testimony.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff CACH, LLC. and against Defendant CHARLES E. HARRIS as follows:
Principal $6,285.22
Pre-Judgment Interest $0.00
Attorney's Fees $975.00
Costs $285.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $7,545.22
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Set For Trial On Jan-21-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
